'''zhazhosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yakdan|yakdan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yakdan|yakdan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhazhosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæzhesheth|zhæzhesheth]] || [[word:zhæzheshej|zhæzheshej]] || [[word:zhæzheshesh|zhæzheshesh]] || [[word:zhæzheshe|zhæzheshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazhozhoshoth|zhazhozhoshoth]] || [[word:zhazhozhoshoj|zhazhozhoshoj]] || [[word:zhazhozhoshosh|zhazhozhoshosh]] || [[word:zhazhozhosho|zhazhozhosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazhoshoth|zhazhoshoth]] || [[word:zhazhoshoj|zhazhoshoj]] || [[word:zhazhoshosh|zhazhoshosh]] || [[word:zhazhosho|zhazhosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazhofshoth|zhazhofshoth]] || [[word:zhazhofshoj|zhazhofshoj]] || [[word:zhazhofshosh|zhazhofshosh]] || [[word:zhazhofshof|zhazhofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhazhoshotho|zhazhoshotho]] || [[word:zhazhoshojo|zhazhoshojo]] || [[word:zhazhoshosho|zhazhoshosho]] || [[word:zhazhoshoko|zhazhoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhazhoshoth|zhazhoshoth]] || [[word:zhazhoshoj|zhazhoshoj]] || [[word:zhazhoshosh|zhazhoshosh]] || [[word:zhazhosho|zhazhosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhazhoshothol|zhazhoshothol]] || [[word:zhazhoshojol|zhazhoshojol]] || [[word:zhazhoshoshol|zhazhoshoshol]] || [[word:zhazhoshokol|zhazhoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhazhoshothotho|zhazhoshothotho]] || [[word:zhazhoshojojo|zhazhoshojojo]] || [[word:zhazhoshoshosho|zhazhoshoshosho]] || [[word:zhazhoshoko|zhazhoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhazhoshothon|zhazhoshothon]] || [[word:zhazhoshojon|zhazhoshojon]] || [[word:zhazhoshoshon|zhazhoshoshon]] || [[word:zhazhoshokon|zhazhoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhazhoshothoro|zhazhoshothoro]] || [[word:zhazhoshojoro|zhazhoshojoro]] || [[word:zhazhoshoshoro|zhazhoshoshoro]] || [[word:zhazhoshokoro|zhazhoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
